title: The Khashabiyyah Perform the Pilgrimage
description: According to Abu Ja'far [sc. al-Tabarij: In this year the Khashabiyyah"0 came to Mecca and performed the pilgrimage. Their leader (amir) was Abu `Abdallah al -Jadali. Why the Khashabiyyah Came to Mecca According to Hishim [b. al-Kalbij-Abu Mikhnaf and `Ali b. Muhammad [al-Madi 'inij-Maslamah b. Muhirib, the reason was as follows: `Abdallah b. al-Zubayr imprisoned Muhammad b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
